topic: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among)

options: This book is between mine and yours.
The cat is under the table.
The book is on the table.
questions.answer: The book is on the table.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "किताब मेज पर है।" = "The book is on the table."
Full sentence: "The cat is under the table."

questions.sentence: We are in the room yesterday.
options: We are in the room yesterday.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We are in the room."

options: He is standing at the door.
He is sitting between two friends.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं 5 बजे आऊँगा।" = "I will come at 5 pm."
Full sentence: "My birthday is in January."
Correct sentence: "The meeting is on Monday."

options: The book is on the table.
This book is between mine and yours.
The lamp is over the table.
questions.answer: The lamp is over the table.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "लैंप टेबल के ऊपर है।" = "The lamp is over the table."

questions.sentence: This book is _____ mine and yours.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "This book is between mine and yours."

questions.sentence: This competition are among three teams.
options: This competition are among three teams.
This competition is among three teams.
questions.answer: This competition is among three teams.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This competition is among three teams."

options: The bridge is over the river.
He is standing at the door.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "हम दिल्ली में रहते हैं।" = "We live in Delhi."
Full sentence: "He is standing at the door."

questions.sentence: The book are on the shelf.
options: The book are on the shelf.
The book is on the shelf.
questions.answer: The book is on the shelf.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "The book is on the shelf."

questions.hindi: बच्चे बगीचे में खेल रहे हैं।
options: The lamp is over the table.
The children are playing in the garden.
questions.answer: The children are playing in the garden.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "बच्चे बगीचे में खेल रहे हैं।" = "The children are playing in the garden."
Full sentence: "My meeting is at 10 am."
Correct sentence: "We travel in summer."

options: The bridge is over the river.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसकी शादी शुक्रवार को है।" = "His wedding is on Friday."
Full sentence: "The bridge is over the river."

questions.sentence: He are sitting between two friends.
options: He are sitting between two friends.
He is sitting between two friends.
questions.answer: He is sitting between two friends.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He is sitting between two friends."

questions.hindi: यह किताब सभी छात्रों के बीच बहुत पसंद है।
options: The children are playing in the garden.
This book is very popular among all students.
questions.answer: This book is very popular among all students.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "यह किताब सभी छात्रों के बीच बहुत पसंद है।" = "This book is very popular among all students."
Full sentence: "I work in the office."
